title: Video Game Imports
wikitext:
[]: Video Game Imports             Quote Post by SonGoku86 » Mon May 27, 2013 5:04 pm If I were to import an Evangelion game, which one would be the best to get for someone who doesn't know any Japanese? Particularly on a region-free console. PSP would probably be best for me. I thought about Battle Orchestra, but is there something better?

[]:             Quote Post by delispin25 » Tue May 28, 2013 5:30 pm I'd go with the Evangelion Battle Orchestra, Evangelion Jo (really fucking good) unless you want to get good relationships with the characters, Japanese isn't needed and the Evangelion Pachinko game, only if you know how to play pachinko, also some Japanese is needed for the menus, but you can navigate without it easily. I own all the Eva PSP games, and those are the best one for people that can read little to no Japanese.
